'''ratïfbïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyctalopy|nyctalopy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyctalopy|nyctalopy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| ratïfbïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rætïfbïfth || rætïfbïfj || rætïfbïfsh || rætïfbïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ratïftïfbïfth || ratïftïfbïfj || ratïftïfbïfsh || ratïftïfbïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ratïfbïfth || ratïfbïfj || ratïfbïfsh || ratïfbïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ratïffbïffth || ratïffbïffj || ratïffbïffsh || ratïffbïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ratïfbïfïf || ratïfbïfïf || ratïfbïfïf || ratïfbïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || ratïfbïfth || ratïfbïfj || ratïfbïfsh || ratïfbïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ratïfbïfïfl || ratïfbïfïfl || ratïfbïfïfl || ratïfbïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ratïfbïfïfïf || ratïfbïfïfïf || ratïfbïfïfïf || ratïfbïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || ratïfbïfïfn || ratïfbïfïfn || ratïfbïfïfn || ratïfbïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ratïfbïfïforo || ratïfbïfïforo || ratïfbïfïforo || ratïfbïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
